title: 전자세금계산서

visual_evidence.note: Top-right blank region beside 승인번호 label; no printed prefix or unit in value cell.
Red 공급자 block first value row; business registration number format visible.
Small supplier-side branch-number cell right of registration number label.
Supplier 상호/법인명 cell contains company name.
Supplier 성명 cell contains representative name.
Supplier address value spans the 사업장 주소 row.
Supplier 업태 cell; text is industry category, not seal despite auto_type.
Supplier 종목 cell to the right of 업태.
Blank supplier email value region; no static suffix in value cell.
Blue 공급받는자 block registration number value cell.
Recipient-side branch-number cell beside registration number.
Recipient 상호/법인명 blank cell.
Recipient 성명 blank cell.
Recipient business address row spans wide blank cell.

Recipient 종목 blank value cell.
First recipient email row blank value cell.
Second recipient email row blank value cell.
작성일자 value appears as YYYY-MM-DD; value cell has no static unit.
Summary supply amount cell contains comma-formatted amount; no printed 원 suffix.
Summary tax amount cell contains comma-formatted amount; no printed 원 suffix.

authoring_notes: Full template image and inpainted template were inspected before unit decisions.
No value-position static currency unit is printed in amount cells, so generator values omit explicit 원 suffix where renderer money.krw supports numeric KRW formatting.
All anchors with status=use in the improved anchor_map_draft are mapped as schema fields.
